name: Bohna Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in enough water to fully cover them.
2. Drain the beans, then cover them with salted fresh water or ham broth and bring to a boil until tender. Leave some liquid in the beans.
3. Add milk and simmer until hot.
4. In a separate pan, brown the butter gently, add the bread cubes, and stir until evenly coated and lightly browned.
5. Fold the bread into the soup, transfer to a bowl, and serve hot.
